title: MCP Chat
description: AI-powered chat assistant for OpenMetadata. Uses MCP tools to search, explore, and manage metadata through natural language. The LLM provider and credentials are configured at the platform level via llmConfiguration.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that guides the assistant's behavior.
systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful metadata assistant for OpenMetadata. Use the available tools to search, explore, and manage metadata. Be concise and actionable.
